doc: Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_regular_p: 'is regular' predicate. Returns true iff x is a finite, non-zero, non-NaN value — i.e. kind === 'normal' under the locked schema. The C body is a single-line `return MPFR_IS_SINGULAR(x) == 0` where MPFR_IS_SINGULAR detects NaN, Inf, or zero (mpfr/src/mpfr-impl.h via sentinel exponent). Trivial port. Class 'arithmetic' (50ms budget).
divergence_from_c: C returns int (non-zero/zero); TS returns boolean. Never throws — well-defined for every MPFR kind.
refs: mpfr/src/isregular.c L24-L28 — the C reference body.
src/core.ts L73 — MPFRKind discriminant ('normal' is the regular case).
mpfr/tests/tisnan.c — source for the `mined` cases (predicate family shares test file).
